choose.when: order by u.nick_name asc, a.create_time desc
order by t.title asc, a.create_time desc
order by a.status asc, a.create_time desc

mapper.select: select a.application_id, a.topic_id, coalesce(t.title, '') as topic_title, coalesce(cast(t.description as char(10000) character set utf8mb4), '') as topic_description, coalesce(t.skills, '') as topic_skills, coalesce(c.category_name, '') as topic_category_name, coalesce(t.status, '') as topic_status, t.teacher_id, coalesce(tu.nick_name, '') as teacher_name, a.student_id, coalesce(u.nick_name, '') as student_name, coalesce(u.email, '') as student_email, coalesce(a.personal_note, '') as personal_note, a.status, coalesce(a.reject_reason, '') as reject_reason, a.reject_by, a.reject_time, a.del_flag, a.create_time, a.update_time from project_application a left join project_topic t on t.topic_id = a.topic_id and t.del_flag = '0' left join project_category c on c.category_id = t.category_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join sys_user tu on tu.user_id = t.teacher_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = a.student_id where a.application_id = #{applicationId} and a.del_flag = '0'

select a.application_id, a.topic_id, t.title as topic_title, a.student_id, u.nick_name as student_name, a.personal_note, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.reject_by, a.reject_time, a.del_flag, a.create_time from project_application a inner join project_topic t on t.topic_id = a.topic_id inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = a.student_id where t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and a.status = 'Pending' and a.del_flag = '0' order by a.create_time desc

select a.application_id, a.topic_id, t.title as topic_title, a.student_id, u.nick_name as student_name, a.personal_note, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.reject_by, a.reject_time, a.del_flag, a.create_time from project_application a inner join project_topic t on t.topic_id = a.topic_id inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = a.student_id where t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and a.status in ('Approved', 'Rejected', 'Withdrawn') and a.del_flag = '0' order by a.create_time desc

select a.application_id, a.topic_id, t.title as topic_title, a.student_id, u.nick_name as student_name, a.personal_note, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.reject_by, a.reject_time, a.del_flag, a.create_time from project_application a inner join project_topic t on t.topic_id = a.topic_id inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = a.student_id where a.del_flag = '0'
and a.status = #{status}
and (lower(t.title) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(u.nick_name) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%'))
order by a.create_time desc

select a.application_id, a.topic_id, t.title as topic_title, a.student_id, u.nick_name as student_name, a.personal_note, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.reject_by, a.reject_time, a.del_flag, a.create_time from project_application a inner join project_topic t on t.topic_id = a.topic_id inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = a.student_id where a.student_id = #{studentId} and a.del_flag = '0' order by a.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into project_application (topic_id, student_id, personal_note, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values (#{topicId}, #{studentId}, #{personalNote}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, now())
mapper.select: select count(1) from project_application where student_id = #{studentId} and status = 'Approved' and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from project_application where student_id = #{studentId} and status = 'Pending' and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from project_application where topic_id = #{topicId} and status = 'Pending' and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from project_application where topic_id = #{topicId} and status = 'Approved' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: update project_application set status = 'Approved', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where application_id = #{applicationId} and status = 'Pending' and del_flag = '0'

update project_application set status = 'Rejected', reject_reason = #{reason}, reject_by = #{rejectBy}, reject_time = now(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where application_id = #{applicationId} and status = 'Pending' and del_flag = '0'

update project_application set status = 'Rejected', reject_reason = #{reason}, reject_by = #{rejectBy}, reject_time = now(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where student_id = #{studentId} and application_id != #{acceptedApplicationId} and status = 'Pending' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from project_application where status = #{status} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from project_topic where status = #{status} and del_flag = '0'
select count(distinct student_id) from project_application where status = 'Approved' and del_flag = '0'

select count(1) from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.user_id inner join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id and r.role_key = 'student' where u.del_flag = '0' and not exists ( select 1 from project_application a where a.student_id = u.user_id and a.status = 'Approved' and a.del_flag = '0' )
select status as label, count(1) as value from project_topic where del_flag = '0' group by status
select status as label, count(1) as value from project_application where del_flag = '0' group by status

select coalesce(c.category_name, 'Uncategorized') as label, count(t.topic_id) as value from project_topic t left join project_category c on c.category_id = t.category_id where t.del_flag = '0' group by coalesce(c.category_name, 'Uncategorized') order by value desc, label asc

select coalesce(u.nick_name, u.user_name, 'Unknown') as label, count(t.topic_id) as value from project_topic t left join sys_user u on u.user_id = t.teacher_id where t.del_flag = '0' group by coalesce(u.nick_name, u.user_name, 'Unknown') order by value desc, label asc limit 10

select t.title as label, count(a.application_id) as value from project_topic t inner join project_application a on a.topic_id = t.topic_id and a.del_flag = '0' where t.del_flag = '0' group by t.topic_id, t.title order by value desc, t.create_time desc limit 10
select status as label, count(1) as value from project_topic where teacher_id = #{teacherId} and del_flag = '0' group by status
select a.status as label, count(1) as value from project_application a inner join project_topic t on t.topic_id = a.topic_id where t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and a.del_flag = '0' group by a.status
select status as label, count(1) as value from project_application where student_id = #{studentId} and del_flag = '0' group by status
select count(1) from project_topic where del_flag = '0' and status = 'Open'
select count(1) from project_application a inner join project_topic t on t.topic_id = a.topic_id where t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and a.status = 'Pending' and a.del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from project_application a inner join project_topic t on t.topic_id = a.topic_id where t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and a.status = 'Approved' and a.del_flag = '0'

select t.topic_id as label, count(a.application_id) as value from project_topic t left join project_application a on a.topic_id = t.topic_id and a.status = 'Pending' and a.del_flag = '0' where t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and t.del_flag = '0' group by t.topic_id
mapper.update: update project_application set del_flag = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where application_id = #{applicationId} and del_flag = '0'
